scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/pages-ui-tokens && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/pages-ui-tokens && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && tsc --noEmit
